message:
fix(evidence-ledger): eliminate three panics from direct indexing and unsafe string slicing

Replace unsafe direct indexing with safe alternatives:
- render_stitching_summary: use .first() with early-return error messages
  instead of [0] subscript
- write_stitching_bundle: use .first().map_or(0, ...) for boundary_count
  instead of [0]
- entry_id formatting: use .get(..16).unwrap_or(&evidence_hash) instead of
  direct &str[..16] slice that panics on non-ASCII or short strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
